title: Dicrastylis exsuccosa
taxonomy: Dicrastylis exsuccosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It belongs to the genus Dicrastylis, which is endemic to Western Australia. Dicrastylis exsuccosa is a shrub that is typically found in the southwestern region of the country. The plant is a part of the mint family, which is a large group of flowering plants. Dicrastylis exsuccosa's classification places it within the class Magnoliopsida, order Lamiales, family Lamiaceae, genus Dicrastylis, and species D. exsuccosa.
